Headline: Closure - Brabyns Preparatory School and Edenhurst Preparatory School, Greater Manchester and Staffordshire
Info: Bellevue Education has announced formal consultations to close both prep schools by the end of the summer term, citing a prolonged period of careful review in response to challenges facing the independent sector.

Headline: Closure - Dean Hole CofE Primary School (State), Nottinghamshire
Info: Nottinghamshire County Council has confirmed the permanent closure of this rural state primary school in August 2026 due to mounting financial pressures and falling pupil numbers making the operation unsustainable.

Headline: Closure - Prestwich Preparatory School, Greater Manchester
Info: This independent school is set to close on 27 March 2026 with only three weeks' notice to parents, following declining finances, external bureaucratic demands, and the headteacher's ill health.

Headline: Merger - Beaudesert Park School and Rugby School, Gloucestershire and Warwickshire
Info: Beaudesert Park School in Stroud has announced an upcoming merger with Rugby School, highlighting the ongoing trend of consolidation and partnerships within the UK independent education sector.

Headline: Closure - Kings Education Beckenham Campus, London
Info: The international education group is closing its Beckenham college campus at the end of the current academic term as part of a strategic reconfiguration driven by external pressures, including the recent VAT levy on private school fees.
